items.line_en: Oh, it's John. What's up, John?

coach.say: Oh, it's John. What's up, John?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / it's John. / What's up, / John?

items.line_en: Hey, great to see you guys. We were just talking about you.

coach.say: Hey, great to see you guys. We were just talking about you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey, / great to see you guys. / We were just talking about you.

items.line_en: Where are you from? Oh, I'm from Sweden.

coach.say: Where are you from? Oh, I'm from Sweden.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Where are you from? / Oh, / I'm from Sweden.

items.line_en: Wow, Sweden? It's really far away.

coach.say: Wow, Sweden? It's really far away.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wow, / Sweden? / It's really far away.

items.line_en: Um, it's not that far compared to other countries in Europe.

coach.say: Um, it's not that far compared to other countries in Europe.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Um, / it's not that far compared to other countries in Europe.

items.line_en: Do people speak English in Sweden?

coach.say: Do people speak English in Sweden?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do people speak English in Sweden?

items.line_en: No. We use Swedish.

coach.say: No. We use Swedish.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No. / We use Swedish.

items.line_en: But you are really fluent in English.

coach.say: But you are really fluent in English.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But you are really fluent in English.

items.line_en: Thanks. My dad is a diplomat, so I grew up in many different countries.

coach.say: Thanks. My dad is a diplomat, so I grew up in many different countries.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks. / My dad is a diplomat, / so I grew up in many different countries.

items.line_en: Wow. Which country have you been?

coach.say: Wow. Which country have you been?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wow. / Which country have you been?

items.line_en: Um, mostly all European countries, such as Germany and France,

coach.say: Um, mostly all European countries, such as Germany and France,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Um, / mostly all European countries, / such as Germany and France,

items.line_en: and Dubai in the Middle East. Oh, and South Korea in Asia.

coach.say: and Dubai in the Middle East. Oh, and South Korea in Asia.
coach.hint: Chunk it: and Dubai in the Middle East. / Oh, / and South Korea in Asia.

items.line_en: South Korea? That's where my family come from.

coach.say: South Korea? That's where my family come from.
coach.hint: Chunk it: South Korea? / That's where my family come from.

items.line_en: Oh, really? Korea is an awesome country.

coach.say: Oh, really? Korea is an awesome country.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / really? / Korea is an awesome country.

items.line_en: Right. Really nice to meet you, John.

coach.say: Right. Really nice to meet you, John.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Right. / Really nice to meet you, / John.

items.line_en: John, are you good at yo-yo?

coach.say: John, are you good at yo-yo?
coach.hint: Chunk it: John, / are you good at yo-yo?

items.line_en: Of course. I can do tricks with this.

coach.say: Of course. I can do tricks with this.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Of course. / I can do tricks with this.

items.line_en: Wow. Nice.

coach.say: Wow. Nice.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wow. / Nice.

items.line_en: Let's role play.

coach.say: Let's role play.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's role play.
